mapper.select: select p.*, e.emp_name, (select count(*) from project_member pm where pm.project_pro_id = p.pro_id) as memberCnt from project p join employee e on p.emp_id = e.emp_id join company c on p.com_id = c.com_id where p.pro_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by p.pro_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into project(com_id, pro_name, pro_desc, emp_id, pro_status, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at ) values(#{comId}, #{proName}, #{proDesc}, #{empId}, #{proStatus}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: select p.*, e.emp_name, (select count(*) from project_member pm where pm.project_pro_id = p.pro_id) as memberCnt from project p join employee e on p.emp_id = e.emp_id join company c on p.com_id = c.com_id where p.pro_status = #{proStatus} order by p.pro_id desc

select p.*, e.emp_name, (select count(*) from project_member pm where pm.project_pro_id = p.pro_id) as memberCnt from project p join employee e on p.emp_id = e.emp_id join company c on p.com_id = c.com_id where p.pro_id = #{proId}
mapper.update: update project set pro_name = #{proName}, pro_desc = #{proDesc}, pro_status = #{proStatus}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = SYSDATE where pro_id = #{proId}
mapper.select: select p.pro_id as proId, p.pro_name as projectName, p.end_date as endDate, nvl(count(t.task_id), 0) as totalTask, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'TODO' then 1 end), 0) as todoCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DOING' then 1 end), 0) as doingCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' then 1 end), 0) as doneCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status <> 'DONE' and t.task_end_date < sysdate then 1 end), 0) as delayCount, nvl(round(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) / count(t.task_id) * 100), 0) as progressRate from project p left join task t on p.pro_id = t.pro_id where p.pro_id = #{proId} group by p.pro_id, p.pro_name, p.end_date

select p.pro_id as proId, p.pro_name as projectName, p.end_date as endDate, (p.end_date - trunc(sysdate)) as remainDays, nvl(count(t.task_id), 0) as totalTask, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' and t.actual_end_date >= trunc(sysdate,'IW') - 7 and t.actual_end_date < trunc(sysdate,'IW') then 1 end), 0) as completedThisWeek, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as doneTaskCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status <> 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as notDoneTaskCount, nvl(sum(case when t.task_status <> 'DONE' and t.task_end_date < sysdate then 1 end), 0) as delayTaskCount, nvl(round(sum(case when t.task_status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) / count(t.task_id) * 100), 0) as progressRate, nvl(round(avg(case when t.actual_start_date is not null and t.actual_end_date is not null then t.actual_end_date - t.actual_start_date end), 1), 0) as avgTaskDays, nvl(round(avg(case when t.actual_end_date > t.task_end_date then t.actual_end_date - t.task_end_date end)), 0) as avgDelayDays from project p left join task t on p.pro_id = t.pro_id where p.pro_id = #{proId} group by p.pro_id, p.pro_name, p.end_date
select pro_id from project where pro_status IN ('TODO','DOING')
